name: Sun-Dried Tomato Cheesecake Squares
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Make the crust: Blend flour and butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg and blend just until dough begins to clump. Press onto the bottom of a 13x9" baking dish (the dough will be thin). Bake for about 10 minutes, until light golden. Cool.
3. For the filling: Finely chop sun-dried tomatoes with reserved oil, garlic, and oregano in a food processor. Blend in eggs. Add cream cheese and blend until smooth. Add sour cream and blend until combined. Transfer to a bowl and mix in chopped green onion. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the filling into the crust and bake for about 20 minutes, or until the filling puffs and is light brown. Cool to room temperature and cut into squares.
